title: archemora ambigua
side_effects: Archemora ambigua can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing rapid heartbeat, nausea, and dizziness in some individuals. In rare cases, it may also lead to allergic reactions, such as itching, redness, and swelling of the skin. Prolonged use or excessive consumption of the plant's extract can result in liver damage and increased risk of bleeding disorders. Additionally, its interaction with certain medications can exacerbate conditions like high blood pressure and anxiety.
